description:
Specification

Product Information

Product Type :Single Box Product

Product Name:Modern TV Stand with LED Lights , Entertainment Center Wooden TV Stand, TV Stand Desk Media Cabinet with Storage for Living Room Bedroom

Place of Origin:China

Main Color:White

Main Material:MDF

Product Dimensions

Assembled Length (in.):65.35

Assembled Width (in.):12.20

Assembled Height (in.):15.75

Product Weight (lbs.):81.40

Package Size

Length (in.):69.69

Width (in.):20.08

Height (in.):6.50

Weight (lbs.):96.80

Product Features

  • This LED TV stand has 16-color LED lights and 4 kinds of flashing effects, which is very suitable for home lovers
  • High Quality Materials: The TV cabinet is made of selected MDF boards and environmentally friendly particle boards, which are safe and durable. The waterproof finish on the surface makes daily cleaning easier.
  • This TV stand has a large storage space, perfect for storing TV components, game accessories, books and decorations. You can also place living room decorations on the TV stand.
  • Follow the instructions to complete the installation quickly. If you encounter any problems during the installation process, you can find us at any time, and we will provide you with the most satisfactory solution.
